name: Slash Command Popup
summary: Frontend autocomplete popup for slash commands with fuzzy matching
goals: Provide a responsive slash command popup with fuzzy search
Enable keyboard navigation through command suggestions

specDetail.description: A SlashCommandPopup component combined with useSlashCompletion hook that displays a popup of available commands when the user types '/'. Supports fuzzy matching, keyboard navigation (arrow keys), and auto-completion on Enter or Tab.

parameters.name: onSelect
parameters.description: Callback when a command is selected

constraints: Must support keyboard navigation (up/down arrows, Enter, Escape)
Must fuzzy-match command names against the typed query

acceptanceCriteria.when: the user types '/' followed by command characters
acceptanceCriteria.then: a filtered popup of matching commands appears with the best match highlighted

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
